narrative:
Lordstown Village C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 771 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.7 percentage points.
